form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== lineNo[行号] materialId[物料] skuId[SKU] uoMId[计量单位] warehouseId[入库库位] =========>quantity[数量与价格]====== quantity[数量] rejectedQuantity[不合格数量] unitPrice[单价] amount[金额(不含税)] batchNo[批号] =========>tax[税务信息]====== taxRate[税率(%)] taxAmount[税额] =========>reference[业务关联]====== receiveId[入库单ID] orderLineId[订单行ID] =========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
